## What the profile does

<!-- A sentence or two: what the triggers feel like in game, and why you set them up this way. -->

## Checklist

- [ ] The profile lives at `profiles/library/<game-slug>.json` (lowercase, hyphens, e.g. `cyberpunk-2077.json`).
- [ ] It was exported from OpenDS5 (**Trigger Profiles → Export**), not hand-written.
- [ ] `meta.game`, `meta.author`, and `meta.description` are filled in.
- [ ] I left `meta.tier` out. It is set by a maintainer after a hardware test.
- [ ] I did **not** edit `profiles/library/index.json`. It is generated on merge.
- [ ] I tested this on a real DualSense.
